import io
import string

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut current = 0
mut found = 0
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(c)
    if c >= 48 and c <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if found == 0
          a = current
        else
          if found == 1
            b = current
          end
        end
        found = found + 1
        current = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    in_num = in_num
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  if found == 0
    a = current
  else
    if found == 1
      b = current
    end
  end
  found = found + 1
end

let g = gcd(a, b)
print("gcd=#{g}")
